Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_A: Architectural evaluations usually occur in isolated vacuums, disjointed from the physical constraints of the domain.
Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_B: AI is often utilized as a reactive generator rather than a proactive topological immune system, resulting in Semantic Saponification and Ontological Flattening.
Hickam_Orientation.LENS: Inversion for Emergence: The human defines the rigid constraints and NFR gating; the AI operates as an Epistemic Escrow, rejecting impossible topologies.

Contrastive_Delta.Pre_State: PolySymbol Pro was purely an interface for localized symbol curation and latent rendering (Aurelius), lacking a system-level architectural immune system.
Contrastive_Delta.Post_State: App integrates the VULCAN Architect Node via an Isomorphic Bridge, permitting users to submit high-level system intents and receive rigorous C4-aligned DAG evaluations with Epistemic Escrow enforcement.
Contrastive_Delta.Isomorphic_Bridge: Complex distributed systems reasoning is executed purely client-side via Gemini API, adhering to SIC 2.1 Compliance without backend dependencies.
